title: Holyhell
description: Vanilla friendly content mod that adds Biblically Accurate Angels
body:
# ABOUT
![Angel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6545ec59f82826b3eabc8eae5b60191ce99529b3.png)

  Holyhell is a mod that aims to add Biblically Accurate Angels and other fun, religion-adjacent mechanics coming from, structures, items , blocks and of course Angels themselves. This is barely an initial release and **will** have updates coming soon to enhance the experience.

  For Any questions regarding gameplay as well as sneak peeks and discussion relating to this mod and many more coming soon here is the **[Discord Invite](https://discord.gg/DZnaNVr4FM)**

  Any issues and bugs can be reported both in the discord server linked above and in the **[Github Issue Tracker](https://github.com/epxzzy/holyhell/issues)**



#   FAQ
![Heretic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83fcdb8844c54aa8438be723ff98ee0495ed0bd2.png)

  - Q: Are you going to add X feature? Or I wanted to suggest Y Idea
  
    A: If you want to see any feature added to the mod you can suggest it on the server and I will be more than open to brainstorm upon the idea, keep in mind it may end up a bit different or not added at all depending on the context


  - Q: Is the mod coming to X version?

    A: After initial release I plan on porting the mod over to 1.21.1 NeoForge, if you are a developer and wish to help me maintain the Forge version or make and maintain a Fabric Version, I am open to discussions in my Discord DM's at ``the_dead_comedian``

  - Q: Are you going to backport?

    A: No, backporting is very tedious


# CREDITS
![Level 3 Bab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8050e9dcfb456351c3665e9903b567e3093fd2ba.png)

I wish to especially thank:

- JadenXGamer and the folks in their server: for supporting me through out the development of this mod and helping me improve my art and modding skills

- Epxzzy (yes I even spelled your name properly) : for helping with various code and animations, also a funny secret feature

- CodenamedSuper: for the various help lent to me during the 2 years of development

- BoldMuddy: for exponentially improving my art skills
 
- The Rest Of the People On my Server for Various ideas and feedback!


## Small PSA
If you wish to learn modding as well I have been working on compiling a bunch of resources so you can learn in a more convenient manner, they are currently hosted on **[Github](https://epxzzy.github.io/Dead-Comedians-Resource-Expansion/))**, I plan on adding a few guides to help the starting process a bit more. If you have any suggestions feel free to tell them in my server


**Thanks for reading all this and downloading the mod!**
